features: New construction townhouse with four levels of luxury living

features: Oversized four-level contemporary new-construction townhome in prime Fort Lee location
3 bedrooms, 4.5 bathrooms including a spa-inspired primary suite with heated floors and soaking tub
Chef’s kitchen with European cabinetry, integrated appliances, wine cooler, and oversized island
Open living areas with expansive Andersen windows and wide-plank European flooring
Ground level with office, recreation room, full bath, and direct backyard access
Private outdoor spaces including deck off kitchen, rooftop deck, and fenced backyard
Smart home features, multi-zone HVAC, central vacuum, security cameras, and attached garage — minutes to the GW Bridge
